refs.description: Envoy's distributed rate limit service keys counters by a time-window divider, the fixed-window sliding-counter approach to rate limiting at scale.
PromQL's engine evaluates range-vector functions (rate, increase, moving aggregates) over a trailing time window that slides across each evaluation step.
Educational reference implementations including sliding-window solutions for subarray sum and substring problems.
Python algorithm library with two-pointer / sliding-window implementations for array and string range problems.
